title: Lavender Purple Wedding Bouquets for Bride Bridesmaid,Lilac Bridal Bouquet Artificial Fake Silk Roses Flowers for Wedding Boho French Vintage Rustic Church Decoration Toss Bouquet (8.6in(M))
features: 【Before Use】 The bouquet may be squeezed after long-term transportation, there might be a little deform. You can adjust the shape of the flowers and leaves after receiving it. And the size and color may vary slightly.

【Lavender Purple Wedding Bouquet】These artificial flowers are handmade with soft silk and high-quality plastic. No need to worry about wilting or watering, these faux flowers will retain their beauty for years to come. Not only do these artificial flowers look stunning, but they are also incredibly realistic to the touch. The real touch feature of these faux flowers adds an extra level of authenticity, making them indistinguishable from real flowers.

【Special Design】 Bouquet made of artificial lavender purple roses,champagne and lilac purple dahlia,white hydrangeas, make for a gental masterpiece, sprinkled with green leaves dusty purple petite rose and purple white ribbon.It is the best substitute for expensive fresh flowers.
【Various Decoration】 Purple bouquet is also a popular choice for weddings and events. It can be used as bride bridesmaid bouquet, wedding, ceremony, anniversary, gift or table decoration.
